text.p: I am very happy writing you this letter. I hope that everybody at abroad is doing fine and your job that of mummy are going on smoothly. For your information, I am hale and hearty over here. please I want to let you know about the last national population and housing census in Nigeria and the benefit the nation and her citizinry stand to gain from it. our last sensus in Nigeria was very good, because we get more population in Nigeria than in dos days, so want to tell you that we are very, very happy for that, when the more increase of population in the country that country it will be getting more stronger, so for that we say thank God. Amin.
